LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS RICHARD ROGERS, LAW OFFICE OF RICHARD M. ROGERS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGE ULTIMATE FACTS SUPPORTING RECOVERY OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. ELEANOR REED, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT GRANTS LORRAINE M. WALSH, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF ELEANOR REED. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: LORRAINE WALSH, ESQ., 925.932.4246, FOR PLAINTIFF ELEANOR REED.
EDWARD HAAS, ESQ., ROECA HAAS HAGER, 415.352.0980, FOR DEFENDANTS RICHARD ROGERS AND LAW OFFICE OF RICHARD ROGERS.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS RICHARD ROGERS, LAW OFFICE OF RICHARD M. ROGERS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Allegations seeking emotional distress damages may not be challenged by way of a demurrer. (counsel for plaintiff to prepare a form of order mirroring the court's ruling and email to court- copying opposing counsel- for signature). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: LORRAINE WALSH, ESQ., 925.932.4246, FOR PLAINTIFF ELEANOR REED.
EDWARD HAAS, ESQ., ROECA HAAS HAGER, 415.352.0980, FOR DEFENDANTS RICHARD ROGERS AND LAW OFFICE OF RICHARD ROGERS.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS RICHARD ROGERS, LAW OFFICE OF RICHARD M. ROGERS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is granted. The Complaint fails to sufficiently allege ultimate facts supporting recovery of emotional distress and punitive damages. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
